settings.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to know more about your commercial laundry solutions.

home.heroTitle: Industrial Laundry Solutions for Hotels, Hospitals & Institutions
home.heroSubtitle: From machine supply to full-scale on-premise laundry operations — we design, install, and manage commercial laundry ecosystems across India and internationally.
home.founderMessage: What began as a vision to bring structured, technology-driven laundry to India has grown into a nationwide operations network trusted by leading hospitality and healthcare brands. Every installation reflects our commitment to hygiene, uptime, and measurable sustainability. We remain focused on building partnerships that last — not transactions that end at commissioning.
home.brandsTitle: Preferred Laundry Partner of Leading Brands
home.newsSubtitle: Stay informed on commercial laundry trends, hygiene standards, and operational best practices.

solutions.title: Build Own & Operate
solutions.shortDescription: We design, own, and operate your on-premise laundry — zero capital investment, predictable performance.
solutions.description: Our Build Own & Operate (BOO) model eliminates upfront capital expenditure while delivering a fully managed on-premise laundry facility. We handle design, equipment procurement, staffing, chemicals, maintenance, and compliance — you receive consistent linen quality with transparent SLAs. Ideal for 5-star hotels, hospital groups, and large institutional campuses seeking operational certainty without balance-sheet burden.
features: Zero capex — we invest in equipment and infrastructure
End-to-end operations including staffing and consumables
Scalable capacity as your linen volumes grow

solutions.title: Turnkey Projects
solutions.shortDescription: Complete laundry systems — from layout design and machine installation to staff training and commissioning.
solutions.description: Our turnkey approach delivers a production-ready commercial laundry from concept to first load. Engineering teams design layouts optimised for workflow, hygiene zoning, and energy efficiency. We procure and install washer-extractors, dryers, ironers, and finishing equipment from global OEM partners, then train your team and hand over documented SOPs.
features: Utility planning — steam, water, drainage, electrical
Commissioning, staff training, and SOP documentation

solutions.title: Linen Rental
solutions.shortDescription: Professionally laundered linens delivered on schedule — freeing your team to focus on core operations.
solutions.description: Outsource your linen lifecycle entirely. We supply quality-assured textiles, collect soiled inventory, process through certified commercial laundries, and deliver fresh stock to your facility on agreed schedules. Inventory tracking, hygiene certification, and replacement management are included.
features: Full linen inventory management and tracking
Flexible volume scaling for seasonal demand

solutions.title: Equipment on Lease
solutions.shortDescription: High-capacity commercial laundry machines on flexible lease terms — no ownership burden.
solutions.description: Access industrial-grade washer-extractors, tumble dryers, flatwork ironers, and finishing lines without large capital outlays. Lease structures include maintenance packages, upgrade options, and terms aligned to your contract cycles. Suitable for expanding properties, pilot operations, and capex-constrained budgets.
features: Flexible lease tenures from 24 to 60 months
Upgrade paths to newer, more efficient models
Tax-efficient structuring for corporate finance teams

testimonials.quote: The BOO model transformed our on-premise laundry from a cost centre into a reliable operational asset. Uptime has exceeded 98% since commissioning.
testimonials.author: Vikram Desai

testimonials.quote: Their turnkey team delivered our 800 kg/day facility ahead of schedule. Training documentation and SOPs made handover seamless for our engineering staff.
testimonials.author: Dr. Priya Nair

testimonials.quote: Linen rental eliminated inventory headaches across our 12-property portfolio. Consistent quality and predictable per-piece costing simplified our P&L planning.
testimonials.author: Arun Khanna

blog.title: Reducing Water Consumption in High-Volume Commercial Laundries
blog.excerpt: How modern washer-extractors and process optimisation cut water use from 24 L/kg to under 8 L/kg without compromising hygiene standards.

blog.title: Hospital Linen Hygiene: Meeting NABH and International Accreditation Requirements
blog.excerpt: A practical guide to designing on-premise hospital laundries that satisfy infection control protocols and audit requirements.

blog.title: Why Five-Star Hotels Are Adopting the BOO Model for On-Premise Laundries
blog.excerpt: Capital efficiency, operational expertise, and SLA-backed performance are driving a shift from owned laundries to managed partnerships.

about.title: About ProLaundry Solutions
about.intro: Since 2010, ProLaundry Solutions has been India's leading provider of commercial laundry machines, on-premise laundry operations, and linen management services. Headquartered in Gurugram, we serve hospitality, healthcare, defence, and institutional clients across 38+ cities with a team of 1,500+ trained professionals.
about.mission: To deliver reliable, sustainable, and cost-effective commercial laundry solutions that let our partners focus on their core business.
about.vision: To be the most trusted commercial laundry partner in South Asia and emerging international markets.

timeline.title: Foundation
timeline.description: Founded in Gurugram with a vision to bring structured, technology-driven commercial laundry to India.

timeline.title: OEM Partnerships
timeline.description: Partnered with leading global laundry equipment manufacturers to bring energy-efficient machines to the Indian market.

timeline.title: Healthcare Expansion
timeline.description: Expanded into hospital and institutional laundries, serving major healthcare networks nationwide.

timeline.title: BOO Model Launch
timeline.description: Introduced Build Own & Operate — enabling hotels and hospitals to run on-premise laundries with zero capex.

timeline.title: Scale Milestone
timeline.description: Processing 100,000+ kg of linen daily across 110+ on-premise sites with industry-leading water efficiency.

sustainability.title: Sustainability Commitment
sustainability.intro: Commercial laundry is resource-intensive. We invest in technology, process design, and operator training to minimise water, energy, and chemical consumption across every site we manage.

initiatives.title: Water Recovery Systems
initiatives.description: Advanced water recycling and heat recovery on high-volume sites reduces freshwater draw by up to 70%.

initiatives.title: Eco-Efficient Equipment
initiatives.description: We specify washer-extractors and dryers with best-in-class specific consumption ratings from certified OEM partners.

initiatives.title: Circular Textile Programme
initiatives.description: End-of-life linen is diverted from landfill through our textile recovery and repurposing initiative.

team.title: Leadership Team
team.intro: Our leadership combines deep operational expertise in commercial laundry with experience scaling B2B service businesses across India.

members.name: Rajesh Mehta
members.bio: 25+ years in commercial laundry operations and hospitality supply chain.

members.name: Anita Sharma
members.bio: Former operations head at a leading hotel group; expert in on-premise laundry SLAs.

members.name: David Chen
members.bio: Leads expansion into Middle East and Southeast Asian markets.

members.name: Sanjay Patel
members.bio: Drives IoT-enabled laundry monitoring and predictive maintenance platforms.

investors.title: Investors
investors.intro: ProLaundry Solutions is backed by growth capital partners who share our commitment to operational excellence and sustainable industrial services.
highlights: Series A funding led by institutional growth investors
Strong unit economics across BOO and managed operations contracts
Expanding addressable market in healthcare and hospitality infrastructure
Proven track record of 14+ years profitable operations

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: Join 1,500+ professionals building India's commercial laundry infrastructure. We offer structured growth paths in operations, engineering, sales, and corporate functions.
benefits: Health insurance for employees and dependents
Technical training on commercial laundry equipment

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Speak with our solutions team about commercial laundry machines, on-premise operations, or partnership models. We respond within one business day.

footer.aboutText: ProLaundry Solutions delivers commercial laundry machines, turnkey installations, and managed on-premise operations for hospitality, healthcare, and institutional clients across India and internationally.
